startups.name: grok-build-bridge
startups.description: Grok Build Bridge is an open-source (Apache 2.0) Python framework that turns any Grok 4.20-generated codebase into a production-ready X agent via a single YAML file. It wraps the official xai-sdk, adds a two-layer safety audit (static + LLM), and deploys through the existing Grok Install Ecosystem.
